behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the skill doc path, exact section header, text, command, and separator '\n\n'; the Go type/field names (ExitError, Original) are discoverable from the repo.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what's broken (wrapped error message not in Error()) without specifying the exact file/line or code to write.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests only check that Error() contains the original message and exit code, and doesn't contain 'nil' when Original is unset — multiple valid implementations pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests compile and execute Go code via `go test` and inspect Error() output behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require Error() to actually include the original error string; a stub returning only exit code would fail test_error_includes_original.

behavior_in_tests.reason: The instruction mandates adding a section to skills/dagger-chores/SKILL.md with exact content, but the config_edit tests in test_outputs.py are empty stubs (only comments '# [config_edit] fail_to_pass'), so the SKILL.md behavior is not tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass, Config edit) and descriptive names.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction refers generically to 'the error type that wraps underlying errors with an exit code' rather than naming exit.go/ExitError directly.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold patch to SKILL.md is a localized append of a new section, not a full-file rewrite.
